case_title: WOOD, KRISTINA M. VS HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES BERTORELLO, ERICA C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WOOD, KRISTINA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERTORELLO, ERICA C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES BERTORELLO, ERICA C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WOOD, KRISTINA M. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $222.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WOOD, KRISTINA M. AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES BERTORELLO, ERICA C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOD, KRISTINA M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOPKINS, LOREN C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES BERTORELLO, ERICA C/O DRYDEN MARGOLES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
